source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/01_HAD1717MC, MG/03_설계개발 출력/02_CCL 및 승인원/승인원/기구/환경자료/동인산업/H&Abyz MSDS& 시험성적서/MSDS PSR (Ver.19-1).pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: S&K POLYTEC MSDS for NANOCELLTM PSR polyurethane foam sheet.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Provides customer safety information for use of the company's product and states that the accuracy and safety of the information are not guaranteed.
keyPoints: Product is identified as NANOCELLTM PSR, a high-density polyurethane foam sheet for shock and vibration absorption.
Hazard classification is listed as H0 F1 R0, with no hazards or harmful effects expected during general handling.
Composition lists polyurethane, calcium carbonate, carbon black, and PET base film with CAS numbers where provided.
Korean legal and transport regulatory sections state no applicable regulation or no classification/control information.

entities.name: 유해화학물질관리법
entities.evidence: 유해화학물질관리법 등 타 부처의 화학물질관리관련법에 의한 규제 규정 없음

entities.name: 선박안전법 위험물선박운송 및 저장규칙
entities.evidence: 선박안전법 위험물선박운송 및 저장규칙에 의한 분류 및 규제 자료 없음

concepts.name: High-density polyurethane foam sheet
concepts.evidence: 제품의 용도 충격 및 진동흡수성을 지닌 고밀도 폴리우레탄 폼 시트

concepts.name: General handling hazard statement
concepts.evidence: 일반적으로 취급 할 시 어떠한 위험이나 유해성이 나타나지 않음

concepts.name: Personal protective equipment
concepts.pageTarget: MSDS Exposure Controls and Personal Protection

evidence.claim: The document is an MSDS for NANOCELL PSR issued by S&K POLYTEC CO.,LTD.
evidence.evidenceText: 물질안전보건자료 MSDS S&K POLYTEC CO.,LTD ... MSDS - NANOCELL PSR

evidence.claim: The product name is NANOCELLTM PSR.
The product is used as a high-density polyurethane foam sheet with shock and vibration absorption properties.
evidence.evidenceText: 제품의 용도 충격 및 진동흡수성을 지닌 고밀도 폴리우레탄 폼 시트

evidence.claim: The document lists version 19-01 and revision 17 with a revision date of 2019-01-04.
The hazard classification is H0 F1 R0.
General handling is stated to present no hazard or harmful effect.
evidence.evidenceText: 일반적으로 취급 할 시 어떠한 위험이나 유해성이 나타나지 않음

evidence.claim: Cutting or finishing work may generate dust from the polyurethane foam sheet.
evidence.evidenceText: 절단이나 다른 마무리 작업 시 폴리우레탄 폼 시트에 먼지가 발생할 수 있음.

evidence.claim: The composition includes polyurethane, calcium carbonate, carbon black, and PET base film.
evidence.evidenceText: Polyurethane Trade Secret max 75; Calcium Carbonate 471-34-1 max 30; Carbon Black 1333-86-4 max 0.55; PET (Base Film) 25038-59-9 max 45

evidence.claim: For exposure controls, ventilation is recommended during cutting, finishing, or hot wire cutting.
evidence.evidenceText: 제단이나 마무리 작업 시 또는 뜨겁게 달구어진 철선으로 제단할 시 환풍기 사용을 권함
evidence.pageTarget: MSDS Exposure Controls and Personal Protection

evidence.claim: The product appearance is a solid conductive high-density polyurethane foam sheet.
evidence.evidenceText: 외관: 고체, 도전성 고밀도 폴리우레탄 폼 시트

evidence.claim: Transport precautions are stated as not regulated.
evidence.evidenceText: 운송 시 주의 사항 규정 없음

evidence.claim: Regulation under the Korean Occupational Safety and Health Act is stated as none.
evidence.pageTarget: Korean Occupational Safety and Health Act

evidence.claim: Regulation under hazardous chemical substance management laws and other ministry chemical management laws is stated as none.
evidence.evidenceText: 유해화학물질관리법 등 타 부처의 화학물질관리관련법에 의한 규제 규정 없음
evidence.pageTarget: Korean Hazardous Chemical Substance Management Regulations

evidence.claim: The document states that it is intended to provide safety information to customers using the company's product.
evidence.evidenceText: 본 자료는 당사 제품을 사용하는 고객들의 안전에 대한 정보 제공을 목적으로 하고 있으며

reviewFlags.reason: The source title contains 'Material Safety Date Sheet', which appears to be an OCR or source typo for Material Safety Data Sheet.
No external standards are identified in the source text.
Authority signal is general; jurisdiction is inferred from the Republic of Korea address and Korean regulatory law references in the source text.
